/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/notepadpp.dir/src/main_mac.mm.o CMakeFiles/notepadpp.dir/src/cocoa/AppDelegate.mm.o CMakeFiles/notepadpp.dir/src/cocoa/NotepadPlusWindowController.mm.o CMakeFiles/notepadpp.dir/src/platform/WindowManager_mac.mm.o CMakeFiles/notepadpp.dir/src/platform/FileSystem_mac.mm.o -o ../bin/notepadpp.app/Contents/MacOS/notepadpp  ../lib/libscintilla.a ../lib/liblexilla.a -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework CoreServices -framework QuartzCore
